title: How to See When a Board Was Last Updated at the Portfolio Level?
excerpt:
I’m trying to find a way to see when a board was last updated at the portfolio level.

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to find a way to see when a board was last updated at the portfolio level.

I know I can see individual board activity logs, but is there a way to view the last update date for all boards in a portfolio? Ideally, I’d like to track when boards were last actively worked on without manually checking each one.
